results.title: The Korean alphabet, called Hangul, is the only major writing system in human history with a known inventor and a documented design rationale — created in 1443 by King Sejong of the Joseon dynasty, who designed each consonant to physically represent the position of the tongue and lips during the corresponding sound, and published a companion document explaining exactly why each letter looked the way it did
results.description: Nobody knows who invented the letter A. Nobody knows who invented the letter B, or C, or any other letter of any writing system used by any other major language on Earth. The Latin alphabet evolved from the Etruscan script over the course of several centuries, with no identifiable inventor and no contemporaneous documentation of [...] The post The Korean alphabet, called Hangul, is the only major writing system in human history with a known inventor and a documented design rationale — created in 1443 by King Sejong of the Joseon dynasty, who designed each consonant to physically represent the position of the tongue and lips during the corresponding sound, and published a companion document explaining exactly why each letter looked the way it did appeared first on Space Daily .

results.title: Claude Tag Brings Ambient AI to Slack: Admins Have Until August 3 to Migrate
results.description: Enterprise AI Slack agent Claude Tag launched June 23 and replaces the old Claude in Slack app, which Anthropic auto-migrates on August 3. Admins have 36 days to configure channel-scoped memory, ambient mode, and agent identity controls before losing the choice of how Claude operates in their workspace.

results.title: Democrats Are Now Openly Talking About Packing The Supreme Court After President Trump’s Latest Wins
results.description: For years, Democrats have told America they are the ones defending democracy, norms, and institutions. Pramila Jayapal went on Newsmax and said Democrats are “absolutely” talking about expanding the Supreme Court. That is the tell. The timing is impossible to miss. The Court just handed President Trump key immigration victories, and the response from the left is already shifting from legal argument to institutional redesign. results.title: AI’s Great Contradiction: Can Technology Save Humanity While Consuming the Resources We Depend On?
results.description: Artificial intelligence is increasingly being heralded as humanity’s next great problem-solving tool. It promises breakthroughs in medicine, education, scientific research, climate modelling, and logistics. Governments, technology companies and investors are pouring billions into AI infrastructure in the belief that it will help solve some of the world’s most pressing challenges. results.title: Colombia vs Portugal: How did a goalless draw send Colombia to the top of group K?
results.description: Colombia claimed top spot in Group K after a tense 0-0 draw with Portugal. A late disallowed goal denied victory, but the result secured a Round of 32 clash with Ghana as Portugal prepare to face Croatia.

results.title: Tom Holland and Zendaya: A Modern Love Story Beyond the Screen
results.description: Tom Holland and Zendaya have transformed their on-screen chemistry into a genuine romance that defies Hollywood norms. Their relationship, built on friendship and mutual support, showcases a refreshing approach to celebrity love stories. Unlike many of their peers, they prioritize privacy and authenticity, proving that a meaningful connection can thrive away from the public eye. As they navigate fame together, their bond continues to inspire fans, redefining what it means to be a couple in the spotlight. Discover how this modern love story is changing the narrative of celebrity romances.

results.title: Iran, US continue escalating attacks, recriminations over peace deal
results.description: Shortly after President Donald Trump warned the US might ”militarily complete the job”, Iran early on Sunday launched missiles and drones on US military sites in Kuwait and Bahrain, continuing a series of escalating attacks.
